TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: === u siwkay niza === Ciinsiwsien, upalaway nu Korea kanatl. u ngangan niza sa, "siw" sa, u makedemecay a tademaw. "sien"sa, u sipunuay a tademaw. u ngangan niza sa , mahiza ku tatayna, sisa panganganen ciniza ku " man". mala upalaway a kawaw i 2007 a mihca. mipalaw tu tilibi atu iga. malakapah ciniza, sisa katuud ku manamuhay a tatayna. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Kim Soo-hyun (Hangul: ÍĻÄžąėŪėĄ; Hanja: ťáĎÁßÄŤ≥Ę; born February 16, 1988) is a South Korean actor best known for his roles in the television dramas Dream High(2011), Moon Embracing the Sun (2012), My Love from the Star (2013) and The Producers (2015), as well as the movies The Thieves (2012) and Secretly, Greatly(2013). Kim was Gallup Korea's Actor of the Year in 2014. He was first included in Forbes Korea Power Celebrity list in 2013 placing 4th, subsequently ranking 2nd in 2015 and 5th in 2016. The business magazine's Asia edition also listed him in its 30 under 30 in 2016. The success of his television dramas throughout Asia established him as a top Hallyu star. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: === u siwkaj niza === ¶iinsiwsi…ôn, upar~…ĺawaj nu kor…ôa kanatr~…ĺ. u ŇčaŇčan niza sa, "siw" sa, u mak…ôd…ôm…ô ¶aj a tad…ômaw. "si…ôn"sa, u sipunuaj a tad…ômaw. u ŇčaŇčan niza sa , mańßiza ku tatajna, sisa paŇčaŇčan…ôn ¶iniza ku " man". mar~…ĺa upar~…ĺawaj a kawaw i **** a mińß ¶a. mipar~…ĺaw tu tir~…ĺibi atu iga. mar~…ĺakapańß ¶iniza, sisa katuud ku manamuńßaj a tatajna. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam kim soo-ńßjun (ńßaŇčur~…ĺ: ***; ńßanja: ***; born f…ôbruarj **, ****) is a soutńß kor…ôan a ¶tor b…ôst known for ńßis ror~…ĺ…ôs in tńß…ô t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision dramas dr…ôam ńßigńß(****), moon …ômbra ¶iŇč tńß…ô sun (****), mj r~…ĺo*…ô from tńß…ô star (****) and tńß…ô produ ¶…ôrs (****), as w…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ as tńß…ô mo*i…ôs tńß…ô tńßi…ô*…ôs (****) and s…ô ¶r…ôtr~…ĺj, gr…ôatr~…ĺj(****). kim was gar~…ĺr~…ĺup kor…ôa Ē~ °s a ¶tor of tńß…ô j…ôar in ****. ńß…ô was first in ¶r~…ĺud…ôd in forb…ôs kor…ôa pow…ôr ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôbritj r~…ĺist in **** pr~…ĺa ¶iŇč *tńß, subs…ô*u…ôntr~…ĺj rankiŇč *nd in **** and *tńß in ****. tńß…ô busin…ôss magazin…ô Ē~ °s asia …ôdition ar~…ĺso r~…ĺist…ôd ńßim in its ** und…ôr ** in ****. tńß…ô su ¶ ¶…ôss of ńßis t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision dramas tńßrougńßout asia …ôstabr~…ĺisńß…ôd ńßim as a top ńßar~…ĺr~…ĺju star. u kawr~…ĺańß niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: === u siwkay niza === Ciinsiwsien, upalaway nu Korea kanatl. u ngangan niza sa, "siw" sa, u makedemecay a tademaw. "sien"sa, u sipunuay a tademaw. u ngangan niza sa , mahiza ku tatayna, sisa panganganen ciniza ku " man". mala upalaway a kawaw i 2007 a mihca. mipalaw tu tilibi atu iga. malakapah ciniza, sisa katuud ku manamuhay a tatayna. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Kim Soo-hyun (Hangul: ÍĻÄžąėŪėĄ; Hanja: ťáĎÁßÄŤ≥Ę; born February 16, 1988) is a South Korean actor best known for his roles in the television dramas Dream High(2011), Moon Embracing the Sun (2012), My Love from the Star (2013) and The Producers (2015), as well as the movies The Thieves (2012) and Secretly, Greatly(2013). Kim was Gallup Korea's Actor of the Year in 2014. He was first included in Forbes Korea Power Celebrity list in 2013 placing 4th, subsequently ranking 2nd in 2015 and 5th in 2016. The business magazine's Asia edition also listed him in its 30 under 30 in 2016. The success of his television dramas throughout Asia established him as a top Hallyu star. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: === u siwkaj niza === ¶iinsiwsi…ôn, upar~…ĺawaj nu kor…ôa kanatr~…ĺ. u ŇčaŇčan niza sa, "siw" sa, u mak…ôd…ôm…ô ¶aj a tad…ômaw. "si…ôn"sa, u sipunuaj a tad…ômaw. u ŇčaŇčan niza sa , mańßiza ku tatajna, sisa paŇčaŇčan…ôn ¶iniza ku " man". mar~…ĺa upar~…ĺawaj a kawaw i **** a mińß ¶a. mipar~…ĺaw tu tir~…ĺibi atu iga. mar~…ĺakapańß ¶iniza, sisa katuud ku manamuńßaj a tatajna. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam kim soo-ńßjun (ńßaŇčur~…ĺ: ***; ńßanja: ***; born f…ôbruarj **, ****) is a soutńß kor…ôan a ¶tor b…ôst known for ńßis ror~…ĺ…ôs in tńß…ô t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision dramas dr…ôam ńßigńß(****), moon …ômbra ¶iŇč tńß…ô sun (****), mj r~…ĺo*…ô from tńß…ô star (****) and tńß…ô produ ¶…ôrs (****), as w…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ as tńß…ô mo*i…ôs tńß…ô tńßi…ô*…ôs (****) and s…ô ¶r…ôtr~…ĺj, gr…ôatr~…ĺj(****). kim was gar~…ĺr~…ĺup kor…ôa Ē~ °s a ¶tor of tńß…ô j…ôar in ****. ńß…ô was first in ¶r~…ĺud…ôd in forb…ôs kor…ôa pow…ôr ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôbritj r~…ĺist in **** pr~…ĺa ¶iŇč *tńß, subs…ô*u…ôntr~…ĺj rankiŇč *nd in **** and *tńß in ****. tńß…ô busin…ôss magazin…ô Ē~ °s asia …ôdition ar~…ĺso r~…ĺist…ôd ńßim in its ** und…ôr ** in ****. tńß…ô su ¶ ¶…ôss of ńßis t…ôr~…ĺ…ô*ision dramas tńßrougńßout asia …ôstabr~…ĺisńß…ôd ńßim as a top ńßar~…ĺr~…ĺju star. u kawr~…ĺańß niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
